architect_notes: Reviewed SPEC.md and AGENTS.md. Analyzed codebase: confirmed pipeline_notifier (Issue #83), pipeline_test (Issue #79), pipeline_83_test exist in src/. Fleshed out root SPEC.md which was sparse template with [由 Developer 根据 SPEC 补充] placeholders. SPEC.md now references the detailed architecture doc at docs/PIPELINE-ARCHITECTURE-81.md, documents the 4-stage pipeline (Architect/Developer/Tester/Reviewer), state file formats, core modules, and acceptance criteria. Codebase already has agent task definitions in agents/architect/, developer/, tester/, reviewer/.
developer_notes: Implemented pipeline_state.h/cpp - core state management module for the 4-session pipeline. Includes PipelineStateManager class that handles stage transitions, state persistence to .pipeline-state/ directory, and JSON state file generation. Also created pipeline_state_test.cpp with 6 passing tests covering init, stage start/complete, transitions, and failure handling. Files created: src/pipeline_state.h, src/pipeline_state.cpp, src/pipeline_state_test.cpp. Updated CMakeLists.txt to include new module and test executable.
